description_long: This is a two-story wooden house with a red gable roof and two prominent dormer windows on the front facade. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, and the foundation appears to be made of concrete or stone. The front features a large double-door garage beneath the main living area, supported by wooden posts, and two blue-framed windows above. On one side, there is a wooden staircase leading up to a side entry door, with a small landing and railing. The roof includes skylights and the rear of the house has additional windows and a secondary entryway accessible by stairs. The overall design is functional and simple, with a focus on practicality and natural materials.
description: A two-story wooden house with a red gable roof, dormer windows, and a garage beneath the main living area. Features include blue-framed windows, a side staircase, and a concrete foundation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double-door garage, two dormer windows, and the main facade with blue-framed windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped roof, three-pane window, and the side staircase leading to an upper entry.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the roof skylights, a small side landing, and the concrete foundation.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing the back door, wooden stairs, and the elevated entry platform.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows on front, asymmetrical on sides and rear
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry via a raised wooden staircase and landing, with a simple door and minimal decorative elements; garage entry below.
